name: Saag Paneer
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil spinach in 8 fluid ounces (cup) water for 5 minutes, drain, chop and set aside.
2. Fry cheese to a golden brown and set aside.
3. Heat 3 tablespoons oil in a saucepan. Stir in fenugreek leaves, then onion and fry until soft and golden.
4. Add garlic, ginger, cumin, turmeric, tomato, salt, and lemon juice. Cook until the oil comes to the surface and the mixture smells fragrant.
5. Mix in the spinach and cook for an additional 5 minutes. Gently stir in the cheese cubes, heat through, and serve with rice and accompaniments.
